description: Accounting/bookkeeping domain rules — BAS account-class map + VAT + double-entry guidance. Modeled on the PerfectBook (bookie) SIE/BAS app. Consumed alongside accounting_schema.json.

double_entry.rule: Per voucher, sum of debits must equal sum of credits (sum of signed amounts = 0).
double_entry.note: Cross-row balance check is enforced in the PerfectBook app; engine validates row-level format + account validity.
